top_signals.title: Dassault Systèmes, iHawk Deploy Virtual Twin Technology for Autonomous Cargo Operations
top_signals.summary: Dassault Systèmes announced the real-world deployment of its virtual twin technology for autonomous cargo operations with Singapore-based deep-tech startup iHawk Global. The system is currently being piloted at an active 50,000 sqm container yard in Singapore…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
